description: Create a new 'Activity' log in farmOS Field Kit named 'Subsoiling - Field 4' dated August 15, 2025. Include the notes: 'Ran Yeomans Keyline Plow to alleviate plow pan compaction. 3 shanks on 30-inch centers. Soil conditions were dry enough for excellent shattering. No subsoil mixing observed. Followed keyline contour pattern.' Add two quantities: 4.5 acres with the label 'Area Treated' and 16 inches with the label 'Working Depth'.
